title: Binaria maximiliani
intro: Binaria maximiliani, also known as False Rue, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Binaria maximiliani include alkaloids, such as maximilianiine and binarine, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In herbal medicine, Binaria maximiliani is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
